LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT AGOSTINO GAMBA'S MOTION FOR AN INTERLOCUTORY JUDGMENT: THE COURT ORDERS THE FOLLOWING: 1) ALL PENDING MOTIONS WILL BE TAKEN OFF CALENDAR (01/26/05 MOTION FOR ACCOUNTING IN DEPT. 301 IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR) OR CONTINUED; NO FURTHER PLEADINGS ARE TO BE FILED. 2) DEFENDANT AGOSTINO GAMBA'S MOTION FOR AN INTERLOCUTORY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO 01/26/05 IN DEPT. 301; NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED. 3) EACH COUNSEL, WITHIN 1 WEEK, ARE TO DEVELOP A PROPOSED LIST OF 5 FORENSIC ACCOUNTANTS AND 5 REAL ESTATE APPRAISERS. IF THE PARTIES ARE UNABLE TO AGREE UPON THE SELECTION OF A FORENSIC ACCOUNTANT AND REAL ESTATE APPRAISER, COUNSEL SHALL SUBMIT, NO LATER THAN 01/12/05, THE PROPOSED LIST TO THE COURT, WHO WILL APPOINT PERSONS TO DETERMINE THE FINANCIAL STRUCTURE. RULING:
DEFENDANT AGOSTINO GAMBA'S MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF A REFEREE AND RECEIVER: The Court orders the following: 1) All pending motions will be taken off calendar (01/26/05 Motion For Accounting in Dept. 301 is ordered off calendar) or continued; no further pleadings are to be filed. 2) Defendant Agostino Gamba's Motion For Appointment Of A Referee And Receiver is CONTINUED to 01/26/05 in Dept. 301; no appearance is required. 3) Each Counsel, within 1 week, are to develop a proposed list of 5 forensic accountants and 5 real estate appraisers. If the parties are unable to agree upon the selection of a forensic accountant and real estate appraiser, Counsel shall submit, no later than 01/12/05, the proposed list to the Court, who will appoint persons to determine the financial structure. MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Marlon V. Young, Esq. (707) 528-2342 for Defendant and Moving Party Gamba
John R. Browne III, Esq. (415) 421-6700 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Faraci
RULING:
DEFENDANT AGOSTINO GAMBA'S MOTION FOR AN INTERLOCUTORY JUDGMENT: The Court orders the following: 1) All pending motions will be taken off calendar (01/26/05 Motion For Accounting in Dept. 301 is ordered off calendar) or continued; no further pleadings are to be filed. 2) Defendant Agostino Gamba's Motion For An Interlocutory Judgment is CONTINUED to 01/26/05 in Dept. 301; no appearance is required. 3) Each Counsel, within 1 week, are to develop a proposed list of 5 forensic accountants and 5 real estate appraisers. If the parties are unable to agree upon the selection of a forensic accountant and real estate appraiser, Counsel shall submit, no later than 01/12/05, the proposed list to the Court, who will appoint persons to determine the financial structure. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
